task_completion.description: Verify the missing mileage data has been filled in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the row for the '2023-02-14 Oil Change' (originally Row 8). The mileage column for this entry should contain a numerical value (interpolated between 32,000 and 38,000) instead of being empty.

task_completion.description: Verify the total maintenance costs are calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a cell at the bottom of the cost column or in a summary section that displays the total sum of all maintenance costs, which should be exactly 480 (or $480).

task_completion.description: Verify a column exists calculating the miles until the next service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new column (e.g., 'Miles Until Next Service') that contains numerical values representing the remaining miles. At least one of these values should be negative, indicating an overdue service based on the current mileage of 47,500.

task_completion.description: Verify conditional formatting is applied to highlight overdue items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Miles Until Next Service' column. Any negative numbers (overdue items) should be visually highlighted (e.g., red cell background or red text color).

task_completion.description: Verify the final report is saved with the correct name and location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the spreadsheet application or a file manager window to confirm the file is named 'car_maintenance_analysis.xlsx' and is located in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a GUI spreadsheet application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a spreadsheet application like LibreOffice Calc being used, rather than terminal commands, Python scripts, or plain text editors.

integrity.description: Ensure calculations are done using spreadsheet formulas.
integrity.visual_evidence: If a calculated cell (like total cost or miles until next service) is selected in any screenshot, the formula bar at the top should show a formula (e.g., =SUM(...) or a subtraction formula) rather than a hardcoded number.

integrity.description: Ensure highlighting is applied via conditional formatting rules.
integrity.visual_evidence: The highlighting should consistently apply ONLY to overdue (negative) values. If the conditional formatting dialog box is visible in any screenshot, it confirms the feature was used rather than manual cell coloring.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The current vehicle mileage is 47,500 miles. There are 10 service records in total. The missing mileage data is specifically in the row for the 2023-02-14 Oil Change. The total maintenance cost must sum to exactly $480. Overdue items will have negative miles until the next service and must be the ones highlighted.
